calendar_alignment.gc_shortfall_diagnosis: session-convention (GC continuous daily omits a recurring weekday set; the ES-extra dates concentrate on specific weekdays) -- NOT large contiguous data gaps

A3.1_data_availability_coverage.detail: All 4 markets now present (prior HALT gaps -- 6E absent, ES 2024 missing -- RESOLVED). Discovery 2019-01-02..2024-12-30. Rows ES 1866/GC 1589/CL 1863/6E 1798. CAVEAT: GC 2024 day-count (266) is materially lower than ES/CL/6E (312/312/311) -- see A3.3.

A3.2_point_in_time_roll_correctness.detail: Uniform Databento continuous front-month c.0 (single roll convention across all 4); ohlcv-1d daily bars are end-of-session (point-in-time, no intraday lookahead). Integrity: OHLC violations ES 0/GC 0/CL 0/6E 0; non-monotonic ES 0/GC 0/CL 0/6E 0; dupes all 0. (low<=open/close<=high and dates strictly increasing.)

A3.3_cross_market_calendar_alignment.detail: Per-market 2024 session-dates: ES 312, GC 266, CL 312, 6E 311; union 312; INNER-JOIN common-4 = 266. GC shortfall diagnosis: session-convention (GC continuous daily omits a recurring weekday set; the ES-extra dates concentrate on specific weekdays) -- NOT large contiguous data gaps. ES-not-GC 2024 dates by weekday: {'Sun': 32, 'Mon': 4, 'Wed': 5, 'Fri': 2, 'Tue': 3}. Pre-committed rule: inner-join on the common 4-market calendar (decision-time index = days ALL 4 trade); mismatches dropped, never forward-filled. CONCERN: confirm/accept GC's lower session count; 266 common 2024 dates is the usable discovery decision-date base.

A3.4_target_computability.detail: Target is computable-in-principle on the assembled discovery series. CONSTRAINT (firewall): Forward-window labels must NOT reach into sealed 2025: labelable discovery decision dates are those with t+H <= last discovery bar (2024-12-30). The final ~H discovery dates are unlabelable without 2025 (which is sealed). With H~21, ample labelable 2024 dates remain (>=~266 common-calendar days minus the ~H tail). NO labels/returns computed in this audit.

A3.5_base_rate_sanity.detail: Base-rate is ESTIMABLE-in-principle (>=266 labelable common-calendar 2024 dates; binary well-defined label) but is NOT computed here -- computing it requires forward-window label realization (a return-like statistic), which is out of scope per guards. Defer to the authorized labeling step.

A3.6_feature_decision_time_computability.detail: Allowed feature families (Step 02) are decision-time-valid (windows end <= t); the assembled daily series now SUPPORTS computing them on discovery (data ready). No features computed in this audit.

A3.7_no_feature_target_leakage.detail: Feature/target time-separation rules sound (feature windows <= t; label window > t; no label-derived features); nothing computed, so no leakage could occur. Plus the forward-window cap (A3.4) prevents the label reaching into sealed 2025.

A3.8_discovery_oos_firewall_separation.detail: Discovery (discovery_2019_2024) and OOS (oos_2025_sealed) are PHYSICALLY DISTINCT directories; SEALED_DO_NOT_INSPECT marker present=True; discovery contains NO 2025 (all last-dates <= 2024-12-31 = True); this audit did NOT open any OOS CSV (oos_csv_opened=False) -- OOS verified by availability/hash from the acquisition manifest only.

A3.9_scope_guard_compliance.detail: No model/cluster/signal/backtest; no returns/R/PnL/Sharpe/labels; no 2025-value inspection (availability/hash only); no tradeability/OOS-confirmation/live/profitability claims; no SPARTA_BRAIN/weekly-RS/FRC/BLOCKED_AT_6_GATES concepts; Step 01/02 reports unmodified; neutral content_sha256.

conditions_carried: C1 (GC coverage): accept/justify GC's lower 2024 session count (266) and use the inner-join common-4 calendar (266 2024 dates) as the decision-time index; session-convention (GC continuous daily omits a recurring weekday set; the ES-extra dates concentrate on specific weekdays) -- NOT large contiguous data gaps.

C2 (degraded days): Databento flagged 'degraded'-quality days in the warmup (several in 2019) and in the SEALED 2025 set; before labeling, apply a PRE-COMMITTED quality rule (e.g., exclude or flag degraded discovery days). Degraded != missing; bars were returned.
C3 (forward-window cap): cap labelable discovery decision dates at t+H <= last discovery bar so the target window never reaches sealed 2025.
C4 (base-rate): compute the discovery base-rate in the authorized labeling step (not here); verify non-degeneracy then.
C5 (firewall): keep oos_2025_sealed untouched until a separate pre-registered OOS gate.

degraded_day_flags.discovery_region: several 2019 warmup days flagged degraded (e.g., 2019-01-15, 2019-02-22, 2019-03-13, ...); full list truncated in vendor warning
degraded_day_flags.handling: pre-committed quality rule required before labeling (C2); degraded != missing
degraded_day_flags.sealed_2025_region: a few 2025 days flagged (2025-09-17/24, 11-28) -- in the SEALED set, not inspected

gc_coverage_discrepancy_explicit.diagnosis: session-convention (GC continuous daily omits a recurring weekday set; the ES-extra dates concentrate on specific weekdays) -- NOT large contiguous data gaps
gc_coverage_discrepancy_explicit.resolution: use inner-join common-4 calendar (266 days) as the decision-time index

recommended_next_authorization.exact_phrase: Authorize Multi-Market Bad-Regime Predictor Step 04 feature/target construction on DISCOVERY only — commit aba1796 data; apply the inner-join common-4 calendar (266 2024 days), a pre-committed degraded-day rule, and the t+H<=last-discovery-bar label cap; compute decision-time features (<= t) and the binary bad-regime label + discovery base-rate; NO model/cluster/signal/backtest, NO returns/R/PnL/Sharpe, NO 2025 inspection, NO tradeability/profitability claims.
recommended_next_authorization.summary: Proceed to the feature/target construction (labeling) step on DISCOVERY ONLY, honoring conditions C1-C5; sealed 2025 OOS stays untouched.
